NSCameraUsageDescription: PawVibe needs access to your camera to take photos of your pets for the AI vibe analysis.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PawVibe needs access to your photo library to select pet photos for the AI vibe analysis.
NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PawVibe needs permission to save your pet's vibe card to your photo library.
NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This identifier will be used to deliver personalized ads to you and improve your experience.
